pages.text: The $(item)Meadow Skyseed$() — dirt and any flower. Pick flowers off a $(bold)Forest or flower-forest$() island.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
The flower isle — grass smothered in blooms. Wildflower, tulip, cornflower, and cherry-blossom looks, every dye-flower among them.
$(bold)Bees$()$(br)Wildflower meadows sometimes carry a $(item)bee nest$() — the start of honey, wax, and honeycomb.
